name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Milwaukee, WI at 11800 W Silver Spring Dr features Western Union Money Order Only, open 24 hours for money orders.
description_long:
Located at 11800 W Silver Spring Dr in Milwaukee, WI, Western Union Money Order Only provides convenient money order services in a standalone location. This Milwaukee branch operates around the clock, opening 24 hours every day of the week to serve the local community's money transfer needs.

This Milwaukee location specializes in money order services, making it an accessible option for residents needing quick, reliable financial transactions. You can reach them at +1 414-462-9655 to confirm service availability or ask about specific transaction requirements.

For Milwaukee residents looking for a trustworthy place to send money orders at any time, this 24-hour location on W Silver Spring Dr is a convenient choice. Bring a valid ID and the recipient information, and you'll be ready to complete your transaction whenever you need it.
address: 11800 W Silver Spring Dr, Milwaukee, WI 53225

company_info.headquarters: 11800 W Silver Spring Dr, Milwaukee, WI 53225

pros: Established 174-year history with deep market credibility and brand recognition globally
Operates as world's largest money-transfer business with extensive agent network worldwide
Provides transfer tracking and price estimation tools for transparency before committing
Serves 9,100 employees across global operations with $4.36 billion annual revenue (2023)
Offers multiple services beyond money transfers including money orders and bill payment
Strong presence in immigrant communities with reliable international transfer corridors
cons: Subject to transfer fees that vary by type and destination, potentially higher than some competitors
Historical focus on international transfers may mean less competitive domestic check-cashing rates
No specific fee structure or rate transparency provided in available company information
Large corporate structure may result in slower customer service compared to smaller providers
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending money internationally to family and home countries
Consumers seeking established, recognized brands for large or important international transfers
Customers needing bill payment and money order services in addition to transfers
Users prioritizing transfer tracking and price estimation transparency tools
diagnosis: Western Union is best for individuals and families sending money domestically or internationally, particularly immigrants wiring funds home, who value brand recognition and global infrastructure over lowest-cost alternatives. The primary caveat is that fees apply to most services and should be compared against competitors, and domestic check-cashing customers may find better rates through local providers.
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 11800 W Silver Spring Dr, Milwaukee, WI. 24-hour money order services for local residents.
